nuggets.idea_one_liner: Low energy is not a biological failure; it is a symptom of a lost goal.
nuggets.why_it_hits: Instantly empowers the user by shifting the solution from 'trying harder' to 'choosing a better destination.'

value_equation.perceived_likelihood: Clear biological/psychological link between goals and dopamine
denominator_notes: Requires setting a new, scary goal

nuggets.proof_quote_redacted: Are you feeling as if there is no goal? You have no energy to work... it's because you have lost your goal... dopamine gets released as we see progress towards a meaningful goal.
proof_anchor_lines: Low energy is just a lost goal
Energy flows where the goal is meaningful
nuggets.hook_angle_1_stakes: The real reason you can't get out of bed.
nuggets.hook_angle_2_identity: The man who owns his engine by choosing his goal.
nuggets.first_step_seed: Identify your previous main goal (e.g. 'making her happy'). Acknowledge it's gone. Pick a new, God-centered milestone and write it down.
